jobDescription: YOU, YES YOU OVER THEREWho we are looking for For an Accountant who will perform bookkeeping and accounting under CAS and US GAAP. Who will help with the establishment of accounting procedures and internal control framework and who will own AP and AR processes and seek improvements. You will be responsible for: Supporting the Finance Manager in preparation of accurate and timely Financial Statements for the month, quarter, and year-end close, in accordance with US GAAP and Czech accounting standards Performing weekly & monthly accounting tasks such as AP, AR, expense reimbursements, journal entries, etc Preparing balance sheet account reconciliations to ensure accurate account balances Assisting with technical accounting projects related to revenue recognition and other Saa S related topics Assisting with selecting and implementing a new ERP system Supporting existing accounting procedures and internal controls and seek opportunities to improve our processes and efficiency Ad hoc reporting and analytic projects as assigned by Finance Manager You possess the following competencies: Minimum 2 years of experience in an Accounting role Strong organizational and verbal/written English communication skills Demonstrated critical thinking capability Strong analytical skills, accuracy and attention to detail a must You are self-motivated, deadline driven and result oriented, a problem solver with a can-do attitude with strong teamwork skills and strong desire to drive changes You are highly skilled in MS Excel (pivot tables, Vlookup, etc.), able to work with large data sets and build reports Public Accounting experience preferred although not required ACCA or CPA track preferred although not required
